Product Details
Composite Seal Rings

Integrated sealing structures that combine multiple lips or materials to improve assembly stability and media separation.

← Back to Product Center

Industrial Product

Composite Seal Rings

Designed for applications where a single seal needs to handle multiple sealing functions within one installation space.

Composite Seal Rings can integrate different elastomer or support elements to simplify assembly, reduce loose parts, and support more stable static sealing interfaces.

Integrated Structure

Helps reduce part count and supports easier installation in compact assemblies.

Media Separation

Useful where different chambers, ports, or sealing faces must remain isolated.

Custom Engineering

Can be tailored around flange geometry, compression targets, and operating media.
